nasb.text: But Joab said to him, “You are not the man to carry news this day, but you shall carry news another day; however, you shall carry no news today because the king’s son is dead.”

esv.text: And Joab said to him, “You are not to carry news today. You may carry news another day, but today you shall carry no news, because the king’s son is dead.”

cnv.text: 約押對他說：“你今天不可去報消息，改天才可以去報。你今天不可去報消息，因為王的兒子死了。”

ccb.text: 但约押对他说：“你今天不要去报信，改天再报吧。你不要今天去，因为王的儿子死了。”
